title: Blast from the Past
description: This mod adds a new biome known as the Frostbite Forest, populated by fantastical versions of Ice Age Animals.
body:
Welcome to the Frostbite Forest, an ancient yet beautiful biome full of unique plants, from the towering cedar trees to the various larkspur flowers, and even giant berry bushes! This surreal forest is also home to fantastical versions of ice age animals, each with a unique personality! There’s also plenty of blocks, items, and secrets for you to uncover!

This mod requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) and [TerraBlender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender).

Feel free to join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/brPabsMDwF)!

![New Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dea2caa7b3761a85f19a072589b854b245d8ab34.png)
